evidence: Merged to main (e3010a3e) and rebuilt + promoted. Removed the whole-file content_pin stamping, the anchor-drift flag, and the content_pin schema field; kept the typed stale_conditions. Root-fixed the migration crutch: extended the map_each transform op with each/delete_field (modes mutually exclusive at schema-load) and converted the two migrations from identity to declarative-transform. Removed the now-dead anchor-drift branch from check-context-currency.ts (script kept for the audit loop) and corrected CLAUDE.md's stale husky-gate line. Deterministic gate green (build/check/test exit 0); context-validate on the migrated .context shows zero anchor-drift / staleness-candidate / schema-invalid; runtime demo shows lagging framework-gaps (1.1.1) and research (1.0.1) blocks carrying content_pin migrate + validate clean at the new versions, input unmutated, idempotent; a fresh adversarial audit cleared all seven vectors and its one low-severity schema finding was fixed + tested.

criteria_results.criterion: content_pin is no longer stamped on any citation/evidence entry by the block-api write path; file-changed baseline_hash and revision-moved baseline_sha stamping still work.
criteria_results.evidence: block-api stampDeclaredBaselines content_pin branch removed; file-changed/revision-moved branches retained (test: 'the write choke stamps typed-condition baselines'); the content_pin schema field is gone so a pin cannot be written.

criteria_results.criterion: evaluateStalenessCandidates no longer emits any anchor-drift candidate; item-status / file-changed / revision-moved typed conditions are still judged.
criteria_results.evidence: driftReasons loop + anchor-drift emitter removed; StalenessCandidate.kind narrowed to 'staleness-candidate'; typed-condition test retained and green; live context-validate emits zero anchor-drift.

criteria_results.criterion: content_pin removed from framework-gaps + research schemas with a migration that strips existing values; context-validate reports no schema-invalid and no anchor-drift.
criteria_results.evidence: schemas bumped 1.1.1->1.2.0 / 1.0.1->1.1.0 (samples + .context); declarative-transform migrations (map_each each/delete_field) strip content_pin from lagging blocks; out-of-band script stripped the live 492 entries; context-validate clean; runtime demo confirms lagging-block migration.

criteria_results.criterion: npm run build + check + test exit 0; a fresh adversarial audit finds no residual pin-stamping or anchor-drift path and confirms typed conditions survive.
criteria_results.evidence: build/check/test exit 0 (nested-delete, idempotency, mode-mutual-exclusion, pruned-currency tests included); fresh adversarial audit cleared all 7 vectors; the one low-severity schema-permissiveness finding was fixed (individual mode mutual-exclusion) and covered by a rejection test.

criteria_results.criterion: Docs synced (ops-registry context-reconcile/validate descriptions, SKILL.md regenerated, package + monorepo READMEs) and CHANGELOG [Unreleased] carries the removal with no substrate-ID citations.
criteria_results.evidence: content_pin/anchor-drift scrubbed from ops-registry context-reconcile description, package README, regenerated SKILL.md; CHANGELOG [Unreleased] carries the removal + the nested-delete migration-op addition (corrected the stale 'identity migration' phrase to declarative-transform); no substrate-ID tokens in CHANGELOG (check-changelog gate passed).
